category_sources: source_facts.description identifies chordii as a text file to music sheet converter.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides chordii; source_facts.homepage path and project page identify Chordii.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Chordii project page and best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage and source_facts.source-archive identify official project distribution but no official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies text-to-music-sheet conversion; source_facts.executables lists chordii and a2crd.
